overall.description: First-person exploration of a futuristic cyberpunk apartment bathroom from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The camera slowly pans around the dimly lit space featuring a bathtub, neon-lit mirrors, and modern fixtures with distinctive cyan accent lighting.

agents.ego_description: slowly walking along the bathtub, observing the neon-lit mirror wall

entered.detail: white rectangular bathtub with metallic trim
large mirror with bright cyan neon lighting along its edges
red floor mat between the tub and vanity area
warm white light fixture above the mirror

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit futuristic bathroom with a white bathtub in the foreground. The camera moves slowly along the tub toward a wall featuring a large mirror framed with bright cyan neon lights. A red carpet lies on the dark floor between the fixtures.

scene_state.functional_zone: bathroom sink area with vanity counter

events.description: camera turns slightly right to face the double sink area

agents.ego_description: approaching the sink counter and turning to survey the vanity area

entered.detail: modern bathroom counter with two sinks and metallic faucets
tall bamboo plant in a pot beside the vanity

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the tub area to the bathroom vanity, revealing a double sink counter with a bamboo plant on the left. The neon mirror shifts to the left side of the frame as the camera turns toward the darker doorway area ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark bathroom corner near exit door

events.description: moving into darker area away from the neon mirror illumination

agents.ego_description: walking toward the dark doorway at the far end of the bathroom

entered.detail: dark doorway with horizontal green light strip above it

segments.scene_description: The camera moves deeper into the bathroom toward a dark doorway marked by a green light strip. The lighting becomes significantly darker as the camera leaves the neon mirror's illumination behind. The bathtub reappears on the right side as the camera approaches the exit.

events.description: turning back toward the brightly lit neon mirror area from the dark corner

agents.ego_description: turning around at the doorway and moving back toward the bathtub and mirror

entered.detail: large mirror with bright cyan neon lighting along its edges

segments.scene_description: At the dark doorway, the camera turns back toward the main bathroom area, returning to the illumination of the neon-lit mirror. The bathtub comes back into central view as the camera completes its circuit of the small room, ending with a view similar to the opening frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera circuit through a dimly lit cyberpunk bathroom that moves from bright neon accents into deep shadow before returning to its starting point. It begins by gliding along a white bathtub toward a large mirror framed in vibrant cyan neon, passing over a red carpet on the dark floor. As the camera reaches the vanity, the view shifts past a double sink and a bamboo plant, turning away from the neon glow toward a dark doorway marked by a green light strip. The scene then plunges into significant darkness as the camera moves deeper into the exit area, leaving the primary illumination behind. Finally, the camera pivots back toward the main room, returning through the cyan light to center the bathtub once more and complete the loop.
